title: Getting Started with CloudDesk
content:
Welcome to CloudDesk! This guide walks you through setting up your account for the first time.

1. Go to app.clouddesk.io and click 'Sign Up'.
2. Enter your work email and create a strong password (min 8 chars, 1 number, 1 symbol).
3. Verify your email address by clicking the link sent to your inbox.
4. Complete your profile: name, timezone, and company.
5. Invite your teammates from Settings → Team.
6. Connect your first integration (Slack, Jira, or GitHub) from the Integrations tab.

Once setup is complete, your Dashboard will populate with activity within 24 hours.
